name: Seam
subtitle: Vintage clothing decision helper
description: Personal iOS app for deciding whether to buy vintage clothing.

apps.name: Seam
apps.subtitle: Vintage clothing buy/skip decisions.
apps.localizedDescription: Compare candidate vintage items against owned items by measurement, price, condition, and duplication risk. Local-first; no auth.
apps.versionDescription:
- Version bump 0.5.1 (build 6)
- Merge pull request #63 from sugarshin/fix/item-detail-display
- Fix item detail/edit screen display issues
- Merge pull request #62 from sugarshin/remove-turborepo
- Remove Turborepo in favor of pnpm -r
- Pin actions to patch versions and drop debug showsdks step
- Fix release skill
- chore(release): update source.json for v0.5.0
